OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff McCormack Baron Ragan Management is present. Represented by Rita Perez.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Charisse Lloyd is present.
Attorney Eric Dixon representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Tsenin, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of SEP-17-2012 is vacated.
